title: GitLab Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
text: GitLab Inc. announced the pricing of its initial public offering of 10,400,000 shares of its Class A common stock at a public offering price of $77.00 per share on October 13, 2021. The company, along with co-founder Sytse Sijbrandij, sold 10.4 million shares for $77 each after marketing them for $66 to $69. The IPO raised approximately $801 million. The shares began trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market on October 14, 2021 under the ticker symbol GTLB. Lead underwriters included Goldman Sachs, J.P. Morgan, and BofA Securities.
